item.description: ## 1.0.5 - If your iPad disconnects while you're sharing, SharePad now tells you — a brief alert appears in the menu-bar icon and the popover so you're not left wondering why your share went black. - Privacy: only the iPad feed window can be picked in a video call's window picker. Other SharePad surfaces (the About panel, update dialogs) can't be shared by mistake. - Smoother handling of edge cases: a stalled iPad start now surfaces honestly instead of looking live, and Camera-blocked-by-policy users see honest copy instead of a Settings button they can't use.
